project_context.mood: Immersive, high-energy, premium, professional, deep space, neon glow
project_context.description: A professional community platform for users to submit Kick clip URLs, watch, upvote, and compete on a weekly leaderboard. Uses 3D hero elements and a highly polished dark mode with toxic green neon accents.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Dark mode needs room to breathe. Use tight gaps for data-heavy areas (leaderboard) and wide gaps for immersive areas.

grids.clip_feed: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#53FC18] text-[#050505] font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#3ECA0D] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(83,252,24,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/10 font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-xl hover:border-white/30 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300
buttons.upvote: group flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 hover:border-[#53FC18]/50 hover:bg-[#53FC18]/10 transition-colors

cards.clip_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 group
cards.leaderboard_row: flex items-center justify-between p-4 rounded-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

hero.description: Immersive 3D scene using React Three Fiber. Abstract dark neon green geometric shapes floating. Overlay is max bg-black/40.

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

interactions_and_motion.page_load: Framer motion staggered fade-in up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
interactions_and_motion.upvote_action: Scale click effect (scale 0.95 -> 1.1 -> 1) with color transition to #53FC18.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have visible hover states, typically brightening text/border or adding a soft neon glow.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 2 for clean, technical look. Icon size 20px (w-5 h-5) for buttons, 24px (w-6 h-6) for headers.

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract shiny green and black liquid patterns
black and green background with wavy lines

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: MUST use 'Unbounded' for headings and 'Outfit' for body. Update Google Fonts import in index.html.

3D HERO: Implement a React Three Fiber scene in the hero. Use abstract geometric shapes with a MeshStandardMaterial (color: '#53FC18', emissive: '#53FC18', wireframe: true or glowing). Use <Float> and <Environment> from drei.
UI COMPONENTS: Use Tailwind + HTML for the main layout. Use Shadcn for modals (like the Submit Clip form).
KICK IFRAME: Use a placeholder or actual iframe approach for rendering Kick clips in the grid.
TESTING: MUST include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (submit-clip-btn, upvote-btn-1, etc.).
STYLING RULE: No pure white backgrounds. Everything is deep black (#050505). No Inter font. Use aggressive padding.
TELEGRAM MOCK: The login should mock a Telegram flow (e.g., 'Login with Telegram' button that just sets a mock user state).
